name: spec2md
description: Convert an OpenAPI/Swagger spec (file or live URL) into a clean Markdown API reference and a compact, token-efficient MCP context file for AI coding agents.

scripts.release: npm test && npm version patch -m "release: v%s" && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:minor: npm test && npm version minor -m "release: v%s" && git push --follow-tags && npm publish
scripts.release:major: npm test && npm version major -m "release: v%s" && git push --follow-tags && npm publish

author: Nguyễn Thành Đạt <dinoboy.dev@gmail.com>
